title: chrysopsis oregona var. rudis
intro: Chrysopsis oregona var. rudis, also known as the California Bay or Silver Bush Sunflower, is a shrubby perennial plant native to California and Oregon in the United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
